meaning: n.英国 Surrey 州的市镇,Epsom 赛马
examples: Try taking nice hot bath with Epsom salts to help relieve some of your back pain.
When I had a sports injury a while back I found Epsom salts really helped. Good tip, Rae!
And add a cup of Epsom salts (magnesium sulfate) to the bath to further ease pain and inflammation.
He had won big races all round the world without ever collecting the Epsom classic.
Queen Elizabeth chose to commence her weekend of celebrations with a visit to Epsom Downs.
